title: Ore Vein miner Tree Capitator
description: A Fully Advance Vein miner + Tree Capitator + Leaf Capitator and also removes leaves when you break tree logs
body:
Tired of spending hours clearing out forests and mining ore veins block by block? > This data pack brings the ultimate quality-of-life upgrade to your world by combining an advanced Vein Miner, Tree Capitator, and Leaf Capitator into one lightweight package.

Key Features:

  • Ore Vein Miner: Chain-mine entire veins of ore instantly.
  • Tree Capitator: Chop down a whole tree by breaking just the bottom log.
  • Fast Leaf Decay: Automatically clears away leftover leaves when a tree is cut down, keeping your world clean and saving you from floating trees.

Perfect for survival worlds, skyblocks, or anyone who wants to skip the tedious grinding and get straight to building and crafting!
